items.title: Customer and market segmentation
items.description: Group users or products by behavioral features to define personas, pricing tiers, and campaign audiences when no authoritative labels exist.

items.title: Vector quantization and compression
items.description: Represent high-volume data (image palettes, embedding codebooks) with k centroid prototypes, reducing storage while preserving approximate structure.

items.title: Prototype-based routing
items.description: Use cluster centroids as theme or issue prototypes—route new tickets, documents, or events to the nearest centroid for triage or monitoring.

items.title: Exploratory data analysis
items.description: Quickly surface k natural groupings in numeric feature tables to guide feature engineering, labeling priorities, and hypothesis formation.
